<!-- Generated by website/gen-cli-reference.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

- [`rig add`](add.qmd) — Install a new R version [alias: install]
- [`rig available`](available.qmd) — List R versions available to install.
- [`rig config`](config.qmd) — Manage rig configuration
- [`rig default`](default.qmd) — Print or set default R version [alias: switch]
- [`rig library`](library.qmd) — Manage package libraries [alias: lib] (experimental)
- [`rig list`](list.qmd) — List installed R versions [alias: ls]
- [`rig proj`](proj.qmd) — Manage R projects (experimental)
- [`rig repos`](repos.qmd) — Manage package repositories
- [`rig resolve`](resolve.qmd) — Resolve a symbolic R version
- [`rig rm`](rm.qmd) — Remove R versions [aliases: del, remove, delete]
- [`rig rstudio`](rstudio.qmd) — Start RStudio with specified R version
- [`rig run`](run.qmd) — Run R, an R script or an R project
- [`rig sysreqs`](sysreqs.qmd) — Manage R-related system libraries and tools (experimental)
- [`rig system`](system.qmd) — Manage current installations
